content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Portfolio is 79% deployed with 10 positions already in the book — we are at the deployment ceiling per my own hysteresis rule. Market showing strong defensive rotation (FMCG, Pharma) and power theme extension, but India VIX at 18.4 signals elevated volatility. Priority is position management: install SLs/targets on every holding (all currently have zero SL which is a hard risk-policy violation), trail winners, and cut the MAHABANK laggard if it breaches support.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Holding at -5% but Q4 was strong (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, CASA 52.5% sector-leading). Stock bounced intraday (+2.75%) off day low 77.28, which aligns with S1 71.65 area as deeper support. Setting SL at 74 (~4.5% below CMP, below recent pivot) to give thesis room; target 88 near prior high zone. R:R ~2.8x. If closes below 74 on daily, thesis breaks."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock +10.45% today on Q4 beat (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%), multiple broker upgrades (MOSL TP 1200, ICICI Sec 1350). Trailing SL to 955 — just below today's low (981) is too tight; 955 gives buffer yet locks in a small loss limit vs entry 984. Target 1140 near 52w high. R:R 3.8x."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.50,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge holding -0.7%. Macro backdrop (geopolitical, INR weakness, GS $5400 LT target) supports holding. SL 118.50 (~5% below CMP, below SMA20 121.92 buffer) preserves hedge role; target 135. Keep as portfolio insurance."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1625.00,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Up +4.4% with strong move (+6.21% today, broke out to new 52w high 1706). Nabha acquisition + summer demand + JM top pick. Trail SL to 1625 (just above entry 1650 — wait, that's below entry) — correcting to 1625 which is below entry but locks most of the gain vs a wider SL; sits just below today's breakout zone. Target 1880 near analyst consensus 2000 zone. R:R 2.1x."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, +9.8% gap today on blowout Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22%, volume +18%). Fresh 52w high. SL 1355 ~4% below CMP protects entry; target 1520. Valuation rich (P/E 72-80) so won't chase — if it gives back the gap, exit cleanly."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1160.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 provisional update (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%). Broke out above 1039 prior 52w high. Q4 results + concall on Apr 27 is the binary event. SL 1015 below breakout zone; target 1160. R:R 2.5x. Max hold 7 days to manage event risk around results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "new_target": 760.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "3.7x volume surge, breakout to new 52w high 696 today. Q4 results Apr 29. SL 655 below 20-DMA; target 760. R:R 2.2x. USFDA 483s are a mild overhang but marked procedural."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "new_target": 2540.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive rotation +6.64% today. Q4 results Apr 28/30 is binary. SL 2280 ~4% below CMP, just above EMA9; target 2540. R:R 2.0x. Keep tight given pre-earnings event risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 440.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "PSU power defensive with summer tailwind. 9.6 GW FY26 adds, NGEL >10 GW. Q4 results May 15. SL 388 below SMA20/recent swing; target 440 below 52w high 448. R:R 2.2x."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 200.00,
      "new_target": 240.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Up +7.41% to fresh 52w high but Q3 PAT was -18.9% YoY — fundamentals lag price. Q4 concall Apr 29 is binary. SL 200 just below breakout level; target 240. R:R 2.3x. Tighter hold given event risk + extended run."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Fundamentals strong post-Q4, giving thesis 10 days. Exit if closes <74 on daily."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up after +10% day. Let winner run to 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 118.50,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge. SL below SMA20 preserves insurance function."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1625.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to just below breakout. +4.4% gain, summer theme intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "reasoning": "Gap on Q4 blowout. Tight SL under today's low given rich valuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout above prior 52w high. SL below breakout structure ahead of Apr 27 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "reasoning": "Volume breakout to 52w high. SL below 20-DMA."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2280.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation intact. Tight SL ahead of Apr 28/30 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Summer theme + record capacity adds. Hold through Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 200.00,
      "reasoning": "Extended rally + weak Q3 fundamentals. Tight SL below breakout ahead of Apr 29 concall."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS (Q4 beat, +8.47%, niche banking-software insulated from IT tariff risk), AUROPHARMA (buyback floor at 1475 through Apr 29 — arbitrage opportunity if stock trades meaningfully below), and DATAPATTNS are all interesting but portfolio is at 79% deployment. No new entries until either (a) an existing SL triggers freeing capital or (b) a current winner hits target. DEEPAKNTR and PIRAMALFIN show extended moves — will wait for consolidation.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Critical risk issue: ALL 10 existing positions had SL=0.00 in the input — this means no broker-side risk protection exists. Every MODIFY above installs a proper SL and target, which is mandatory per risk policy. Portfolio is highly concentrated in Pharma (GRANULES + indirectly defensive names), Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER = ~19% of capital, near my 20% cluster cap — STOP adding power), FMCG (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR ~7%), and Banking/Financials (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK ~24%). Financials cluster is the largest and I will not add another financial name. Heavy earnings-event week ahead (AUBANK Apr 27, HINDUNILVR/ADANIPOWER/GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 28/30) — tight SLs are the correct posture. Capital preservation mode until deployment drops below 60%."
}
